title: Staff Reports

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a listing/navigation page for the New York Fed's Staff Reports series, an archive of technical working papers spanning 1995-2017. The page provides an index of papers organized by year with titles and authors, but does not contain the full text or substantive content of any individual paper. Some indexed papers relate tangentially to market structure topics (e.g., Treasury market liquidity indices, monetary policy implementation frameworks), but the source itself offers no actionable analysis.
key_points: Source is a listing page for New York Fed Staff Reports series, not an individual research document
Papers listed span from 1995 to 2017, indicating historical archive content
Most recent items visible are from November 2017
Example market-structure-adjacent papers: 'An Index of Treasury Market Liquidity: 1991-2017' (SR827), 'The Treasury Market Practices Group: Creation and Early Initiatives' (SR823)
Page includes year-browse navigation and advanced search tools rather than substantive research content
No publication date provided for the page itself; individual paper dates range up to 2017
why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as an archiveable research document because it is a navigation index. Researchers seeking market structure or macro catalysts content would need to access individual Staff Reports directly, not this listing page. The archive contains relevant papers but this page does not deliver them.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (source_type: listing_page), which per CORE RULE 5 requires rejection
Page contains no substantive research content - only an index of paper titles and authors
Published_at is blank and individual papers date to 2017 or earlier, making content stale relative to TODAY (2026-03-31)
Source cannot provide actionable market structure or macro catalyst insights as it is merely an archive index

notes: Source is a high-trust domain (newyorkfed.org) but the content is a navigation index. The page provides year-based browsing for Staff Reports series papers. Individual papers are not accessible from this listing—users must navigate to specific paper URLs. Published_at is blank because the page itself has no discrete publication date; individual reports are dated 1995-2017. This source is not suitable for direct archiving but could serve as a reference for identifying specific research papers for separate crawling.
